brand_constants.colors: dark emerald green (#0f1a0f), deep black, rich gold (#c9a227)
brand_constants.lighting: warm directional gold light from above, cinematic
brand_constants.rule: NEVER generate text, words, letters, logos, or price tags inside images

character_appearances.lady_e_wc: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing a black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold accents and a gold whistle on a chain around her neck, long black gloves, large gold hoop earrings, gold bracelet, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick, tall confident posture
character_appearances.lucky_lou_wc: Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wide expressive eyes, large warm smile, wearing a green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, fishing hat covered in slot machine emoji stickers, gold star stickers, and now also a small soccer ball sticker, mismatched lucky socks (one green one gold) visible above loafers, always near a 4-leaf clover
character_appearances.golden_dealer: Tall male character, all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, gold-edged card deck, wide-brim hat with face partially shadowed showing only jaw and lips, completely still

assets.prompt: 15-second vertical cinematic video clip. Shot: Black female character in black-and-gold striped referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on chain raises whistle to crimson lips and blows. Camera movement: slow push-in starting from wide angle to close on her face as golden coins and sparks explode outward from the whistle blast. Character action: she blows the whistle, then slowly lowers it with a half-smile, gold crown headpiece gleaming. Lighting: warm directional gold stadium spotlights from above, dramatic shadows, dark emerald background. Atmosphere: electric, triumphant, golden particles raining, stadium crowd ambiance fading in. Style: photorealistic cinematic. Color: dark green black gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: begins at mid-shot, pushes to close-up on face as coins explode.

Wide shot. Setting: vast dark emerald green stadium turf at night, goal net visible in soft focus background with gold light dripping through the net like liquid. Black female character mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress, gold whistle on gold chain, long black gloves, large gold hoop earrings, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick, standing with arms slightly outstretched in a powerful commanding pose. Lighting: single warm gold stadium spotlight from directly above, dramatic chiaroscuro, gold rim lighting on edges of dress. Mood: premium, aspirational, commanding. Foreground: scattered gold casino chips and a single soccer ball catching gold light. Background: stadium lights creating bokeh halos in dark green and gold. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: slightly low angle looking up to amplify authority.

Close-up cinematic shot. A single oversized soccer boot sculpted entirely from solid gold, sitting on a pedestal of dark black marble. From the boot's opening, a cascade of gold coins pours out and spills down the pedestal. Lighting: warm directional gold beam from above, rest in deep shadow. Foreground: a few gold coins in sharp focus catching light. Background: pure darkness with faint dark emerald green glow at edges. Mood: trophy-level prestige, jackpot excitement, luxury. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, hyper-detailed gold textures. Color: gold, black, deep emerald. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: slightly below eye level of boot, looking up to convey grandeur.

assets.character: Lady E (World Cup Variant) + Lucky Lou (World Cup Variant)
assets.prompt: Medium shot. Setting: entrance to a luxury casino space with dark emerald green walls and gold trim, large golden door open behind the characters. Black female character mid-30s to early 40s in black and gold striped referee-inspired dress, gold whistle on chain, gold crown headpiece, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson lipstick, extending one long-gloved hand toward the camera with a warm inviting smile. At her right side, slightly behind her, a male character mid-30s stocky build in green-and-gold soccer jersey, fishing hat with slot machine stickers and soccer ball sticker, giving two enthusiastic thumbs up with a giant warm smile. Lighting: warm gold light spilling from inside the door, golden welcome glow. Mood: welcoming, premium, inclusive, community-first. Foreground: gold casino chips scattered on a deep emerald carpet. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: eye-level medium shot, wide enough to include both characters and the golden door.

Action shot. Setting: dark emerald green soccer field with gold stadium lights. Male character mid-30s, stocky build, wide expressive eyes filled with joy, enormous warm smile, running toward the camera with arms spread wide in a welcoming embrace gesture. Wearing green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, fishing hat with slot machine emoji stickers and small soccer ball sticker, one green lucky sock and one gold lucky sock visible. He's holding a 4-leaf clover in one outstretched hand. Lighting: warm stadium gold light from above, green turf glowing. Mood: joyful, welcoming, lovable underdog energy. Foreground: a few gold coins and a single casino chip on the turf catching light. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: low angle looking slightly up, wide shot as character runs toward viewer.

Macro close-up cinematic still. A black-and-white soccer ball mid-spin in the air is caught in the precise moment of morphing into a glowing gold casino chip — the left half is clearly soccer ball, the right half has transformed into the gold chip with ridged edges, gold dust and sparks streaming from the transformation seam. Lighting: split lighting — cool blue-white on soccer ball side, warm gold on chip side. Background: dark emerald green gradient. Mood: magical, electric, surreal luxury. Foreground: tiny gold dust motes floating. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, hyper-detailed material textures, gold and emerald palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: extreme close-up, object centered, shallow depth of field, background blurred.

15-second vertical cinematic video clip. Shot: Male character mid-30s stocky build in green-and-gold soccer jersey, fishing hat with stickers, spinning a massive glowing golden wheel mounted on a dark emerald green field under stadium lights. Camera movement: wide shot establishing the scene, then slow circular pan around Lucky Lou as he spins the wheel. Character action: He grabs the wheel handle with both hands and heaves it into a spin. Wheel slows. Arrow clicks to BONUS. His eyes go wide, then he explodes into a full celebration — drops to his knees, slides on the turf (goal celebration style), arms raised. Lighting: gold wheel casting warm rotating light on his face and jersey. Atmosphere: electric, triumphant, gold sparks flying from the wheel as it spins, crowd cheer sound cue. Style: photorealistic cinematic. Color: dark green, black, gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: begins wide, follows the celebration to a close-up of his victorious face.

Still life cinematic shot. Three identical oversized soccer balls made entirely of layered solid gold are lined up in a precise row on a dark emerald green penalty spot. Each gold soccer ball is in the process of morphing — gold coins cascade from the bottom of each ball like a waterfall, pooling in stacks on the emerald turf. Lighting: each ball lit by its own overhead warm gold stadium spotlight, dramatic shadows between them. Mood: luxury, anticipation, jackpot energy. Foreground: gold coin stacks on turf in sharp focus. Background: dark stadium in soft focus with green and gold bokeh. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, hyper-detailed gold texture, dark green and gold palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: low angle, looking slightly upward along the line of three balls, conveying grandeur and repetition.

Symmetrical flat-lay cinematic shot. Two identical solid gold soccer boots placed side by side on dark emerald green turf, toes pointing away from camera. Each boot glows with an internal warm gold light. Between them, two 4-leaf clovers made of gold leaf placed in perfect symmetry. Lighting: overhead warm gold spot illuminating both boots equally, turf in deep shadow between them. Mood: partnership, shared win, premium referral energy. Foreground: single gold casino chip centered between the two boots, catching the light. Background: pure dark emerald gradient fading to black. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, luxury product photography style. Color: gold and emerald. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: directly overhead (top-down flat-lay), slight tilt for dimension.

Dramatic close shot. Setting: dark studio background, single warm gold overhead light. Tall male character in all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, wide-brim hat casting face in half-shadow — only jaw and chin visible beneath the shadow. He extends one gloved hand toward camera with exactly three fingers raised. Floating in the space above the three raised fingers: three small perfectly round gold casino chips materializing from golden light particles, hovering in the air. Character is utterly still, no expression visible — pure mystery and authority. Lighting: single gold overhead key light, everything else in deep shadow, chips creating their own warm glow. Mood: silent authority, urgency, mystery. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, high contrast, dark green black gold palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: medium shot, slightly below eye-line of the outstretched hand.

Medium shot. Setting: dark luxury casino interior, emerald green velvet walls, gold sconces. Black female character mid-30s to early 40s in black and gold striped referee-inspired dress, gold whistle on chain, gold crown headpiece, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson lipstick. She holds up a large ornate gold pocket watch toward the camera with one gloved hand, eyes wide and direct, expression conveying warm urgency. Her other hand is raised palm-out in a gentle stop gesture. Above and around her, a cascade of gold coins rains from ceiling, catching the warm light. Lighting: warm gold sconce light from sides, coin shower catching light from above. Mood: urgent but warm, don't miss out. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green black gold palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: eye-level medium shot, watch in foreground slightly blurred, face in sharp focus behind it.

Hero product shot. Setting: dark marble pedestal on dark emerald green background. An oversized trophy in the shape of a golden soccer boot sits on the pedestal, trophy-style with a wide gold base. Surrounding the trophy at its base: an overflowing pile of gold coins that have cascaded off the pedestal and pooled on the emerald surface below. A single emerald green spotlight from directly above illuminates the trophy in warm gold, the rest of the scene in dramatic deep shadow. Mood: aspirational, jackpot prestige, coveted prize. Foreground: loose gold coins at camera edge in shallow focus. Background: pure dark emerald fading to black, faint gold particles suspended in air. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, luxury editorial, trophy-showcase lighting. Color: gold, emerald, black. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: slightly below pedestal level, angled up at 15 degrees, trophy commanding the frame.

Wide group shot. Setting: dark emerald green soccer turf at night under stadium floodlights. A group of four to five diverse adults — varied ages, backgrounds, all in casual elegant style with touches of gold and green accessories — celebrating together with arms raised high, wide joyful smiles, in the midst of a golden and green confetti explosion raining from above. The group is tightly arranged, everyone leaning into each other in a community celebration. Lighting: warm gold stadium floodlights from above, confetti catching the light in a shower of gold and emerald green. Mood: pure joy, community, belonging, winning together. Foreground: confetti landing in front of camera. Background: stadium lights creating warm bokeh halos. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, warm golden tones. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: wide shot, group centered, slight low angle to feel immersive and celebratory.

assets.character: Lucky Lou (WC) + Lady E (WC) + Golden Dealer
assets.prompt: 20-second vertical cinematic video. Three-scene montage cut rapidly: SCENE 1 (7 sec): Male character in green-gold soccer jersey does a full knee-slide goal celebration on dark emerald turf, arms wide, fishing hat nearly flying off, enormous grin — stadium lights burst gold above him. SCENE 2 (7 sec): Black female character in black-gold referee dress raises a gold trophy above her head with both gloved hands, crimson lips in a triumphant smile, gold coins raining from above as she stands on emerald turf. SCENE 3 (6 sec): Tall dealer in black suit, wide-brim hat, places one final gold casino chip with perfect precision onto a stack of chips that reaches screen height — chips catch light as they sway and settle. Camera movement: each scene has a slow push-in. Cuts are sharp and rhythmic. Lighting: warm gold stadium floodlights, dramatic. Atmosphere: euphoric, triumphant, electric. Afrobeats drum beat sound cue. Style: photorealistic cinematic. Color: dark green black gold. No text no words no letters.

Atmospheric night shot. Setting: empty dark stadium at midnight, only a single gold spotlight remaining on, all other lights off. Male character mid-30s in green-and-gold soccer jersey and fishing hat with stickers stands alone under the spotlight, looking down at a glowing object in his hands (implied phone/device, represented as a warm gold glow source). His eyes go comically wide, jaw drops, then his face breaks into an enormous grin. From directly above him, a cascade of gold coins begins to fall, slowly at first then torrential, catching the spotlight. Lighting: single overhead stadium spotlight, everything else pitch black, coins illuminated mid-fall. Mood: late-night surprise, mystery revealed, pure delight. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, ultra-dramatic lighting contrast. Color: black, gold, traces of dark emerald on his jersey. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: wide shot establishing loneliness under spotlight, then the coins change the mood entirely.

Victory shot. Setting: dark emerald green stadium turf, midnight. Male character mid-30s, stocky build, in green-and-gold soccer jersey and fishing hat with stickers, on his knees on the turf with both arms raised straight to the sky in pure triumph. His face is tilted upward, eyes closed in overwhelmed joy, enormous smile. From directly above: a thick downpour of gold coins falls, coating his shoulders and the turf around him in a golden layer. His 4-leaf clover is visible in one raised hand. His mismatched lucky socks (one green, one gold) caught in the light at the edge of frame. Soccer jersey glowing gold in the coin-light. Lighting: warm gold from above (coin-light source), dark dramatic surroundings. Mood: the underdog finally wins — emotional, triumphant, earned, joyful. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, emotionally resonant. Color: dark green, black, gold. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: medium shot slightly below eye level, amplifying the triumph gesture.

12-second vertical cinematic video. Shot: Black female character in black-and-gold referee-inspired dress, gold whistle on chain, gold crown headpiece, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson lipstick walks slowly toward camera down a long dark corridor with dark emerald green walls and gold trim. Camera movement: slow reverse dolly — camera retreats as she advances, keeping her at the same size. Character action: she walks with absolute confidence and calm. Halfway through, she stops. Holds up exactly one gloved finger toward the camera. Then gives the faintest half-smile. She doesn't speak. Slowly, the scene dims to black from the edges inward, but her gold crown headpiece catches the last point of light before complete fade. Audio cue: whisper of wind, single piano note, silence. Lighting: dim warm gold corridor lights, final gold point on crown. Mood: mystery, anticipation, premium exclusivity. Style: photorealistic cinematic, ultra-slow, deliberate. Color: dark emerald, black, gold. No text no words no letters. Camera: retreating medium shot.

Voice: Lady E. Preset: Vesper. Voice ID: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Text: 'You found us. And that means today is already a good day. At Lady E Luck, every new player walks in with a bonus waiting — no questions, no waiting. Just your moment to play. Welcome home.' Emotion: warm, genuine, inviting, premium confidence. Pacing: slow and deliberate, slight pause after 'good day' and 'waiting.' Notes: Velvet-smooth delivery. She speaks like she owns the room but wants you to feel at home in it. No rush.

Voice: Lady E. Preset: Vesper. Voice ID: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Text: 'The Golden Hour is here. Halftime Reload just dropped. If you've been playing today — check your account right now. The second half always surprises.' Emotion: mysterious, knowing, intimate, late-night. Pacing: hushed and deliberate. Pause after 'right now.' Final line delivered with a slight smile in the voice. Notes: Like a secret being shared. She whispers the last sentence almost conspiratorially.

Voice: Lucky Lou. Preset: Leo. Voice ID: 73a45c18-0c56-4642-a61e-f6b303f8ded1. Text: 'Three recharges. Match hours only. ONE — TWO — THREE. Hat Trick Bonus. I almost forgot to tell you! Don't miss it — ends at six!' Emotion: excited, breathless, lovably urgent. Pacing: quick and energetic, dramatic pause between ONE, TWO, THREE. 'I almost forgot to tell you!' delivered like a happy accident. Final line fast and urgent. Notes: Lucky Lou talks like he just remembered something amazing and can't wait to share it.

assets.post_time: All day — use in Reels and Stories
assets.platform: Facebook + Instagram (background music for video content)
assets.prompt: Voice: Lady E. Preset: Vesper. Voice ID: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Music mode: full song production. Genre: Afrobeats / Trap Fusion. BPM: 105. Key: F# minor. Instruments: 808 bass, live percussion talking drum layer, brass section hits on chorus, warm synth pads, stadium crowd swell on bridges, gold-coin metallic percussion sound integrated into beat. Song title: Golden Kick. Full lyrics — Intro: 'Mmm... yeah... Lady E Luck, we playing for gold tonight, Quarterfinal Friday — every kick, every spin, every light.' Verse 1: 'Rise up it is the golden hour, Turf is green the crown is ours, Every recharge stacking power, Hat trick coming watch it flower, Lucky Lou he put his boots on, Dealer laid the chips and moved on, Community we never lose long, Fortune Friday play your truth song.' Pre-Chorus: 'Oh-oh the whistle blow, Gold light everywhere we go, Oh-oh feel that glow, Lady E Luck steal the show.' Chorus: 'Golden kick golden kick, Every spin is a hat trick, Golden kick golden kick, Win it like a classic, Score big rise up we riding till midnight, Lady E Luck where every Friday is a highlight, Golden kick yeah yeah, Golden kick hey hey hey.' Verse 2: 'Penalty spot one chip in the net, Biggest recharge you win do not forget, Golden Boot Jackpot no regret, Fortune Friday not done yet, Pass the code let your people in, They score a bonus you both win, Halftime Reload about to begin, Lady E Luck cannot stop the spin.' Bridge: 'From the opening whistle to the golden hour, We built this for the ones who know their power, Not about the rush it is the community we grow, Every Friday night we putting on a show, Lucky Lou said I almost missed it, Lady E said Baby you were gifted, Golden Dealer smiled the table shifted, Fortune Friday lifted lifted.' Final Chorus: 'Golden kick golden kick, Every spin is a hat trick, Golden kick golden kick, Win it like a classic, Score big rise up we riding till midnight, Lady E Luck where every Friday is a highlight, Golden kick yeah yeah, Golden kick hey hey hey, GOLDEN KICK!' Outro: 'Halftime Reload dropping tonight... Stay close... the second half always surprises... Lady E Luck... playing for gold... Golden kick... yeah...' Emotion: triumphant, electric, warm community energy, stadium anthem. Notes: Production should feel like a premium stadium anthem that still has warmth and community in the bass. The chorus should feel like a crowd can sing along.
